overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game. The player walks through a dimly lit neon-lit apartment room featuring a holographic fish display, passing a table with various objects and approaching an exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living space with holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the apartment toward the holographic fish display

entered.detail: glowing spherical hologram with blue and orange fish swimming around it
low table with various items scattered on surface
several glass bottles on the table
ashtray with cigarettes on the table
mobile phone lying on the table
pink neon light strips on the back wall
tall illuminated aquarium tank with blue lighting
zebra-patterned rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment with vibrant neon lighting. The camera is positioned near a wooden coffee table cluttered with bottles, an ashtray, and a phone. Ahead, a mesmerizing holographic display shows two fish swimming around a glowing sphere, while a lit aquarium stands against the left wall. The player walks forward steadily through the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to apartment exit door

events.description: game UI interaction prompt appears at bottom of screen indicating the door can be opened

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the exit door at the end of the room

entered.detail: closed door at the end of the room with red light strip above
floating UI text indicating open action available

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the holographic display and table, which exit the frame behind. The focus shifts to the exit door at the end of the room, approached steadily. The aquarium remains visible on the left wall but recedes into the distance. A slatted metal railing runs along the right wall. Near the end of the segment, a game UI prompt appears indicating the door can be opened.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment that transitions from a cluttered living area toward a closed exit door. It begins near a wooden coffee table strewn with bottles and an ashtray, moving steadily past a lit aquarium and a mesmerizing holographic display of fish swimming around a glowing sphere. As the camera advances, the table and hologram recede from view, shifting the focus toward the far end of the room. The scene then narrows along a slatted metal railing on the right wall while the aquarium fades into the distance. Finally, the camera reaches the exit door just as a game UI prompt appears, signaling the end of the traversal.
